languages.text: {n}Заметив Ульфара, Себериан оживляется.{/n} "Кровь Бога-Императора и всех святых! Что привело сюда одного из Его Ангелов? Впрочем, это не так важно. Важно то, что ваше присутствие, несомненно, переломит ход битвы".

{n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"
languages.original_text: {n}Заметив Ульфара, Себериан оживляется.{/n} "Кровь Бога-Императора и всех святых! Что привело сюда одного из Его Ангелов? Впрочем, это не так важно. Важно то, что ваше присутствие, несомненно, переломит ход битвы".

traits.locale_text: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

{n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

{n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

languages.text: {n}注意到乌尔法后，塞贝里安的脸色亮了起来。{/n}“神皇及诸圣人之血在上！不知祂的天使因何事驾临此地？不过这不重要。重要的是，有您在此，战局必将扭转！”
languages.original_text: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}注意到乌尔法后，塞贝里安的脸色亮了起来。{/n}“神皇及诸圣人之血在上！不知祂的天使因何事驾临此地？不过这不重要。重要的是，有您在此，战局必将扭转！”

languages.text: {n}Les traits de Seberian s'illuminent à la vue d'Ulfar.{/n} « Par le sang de l'Empereur-Dieu et tous Ses saints ! Quel bon vent nous amène l'un de Ses anges ? Mais peu importe. L'essentiel, c'est que votre seule présence ne manquera pas de faire tourner la bataille en notre faveur ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Les traits de Seberian s'illuminent à la vue d'Ulfar.{/n} « Par le sang de l'Empereur-Dieu et tous Ses saints ! Quel bon vent nous amène l'un de Ses anges ? Mais peu importe. L'essentiel, c'est que votre seule présence ne manquera pas de faire tourner la bataille en notre faveur ! »

languages.text: {n}Ulfar'ı fark eden Seberian'ın yüzüne nur geliyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator'un kanı ve tüm azizler aşkına! O'nun Meleklerinden birini buraya hangi rüzgâr attı? Ancak bunun pek önemi yok. Asıl önemli olan, varlığının kesinlikle savaşın gidişatını değiştirecek olması!"
languages.original_text: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar'ı fark eden Seberian'ın yüzüne nur geliyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator'un kanı ve tüm azizler aşkına! O'nun Meleklerinden birini buraya hangi rüzgâr attı? Ancak bunun pek önemi yok. Asıl önemli olan, varlığının kesinlikle savaşın gidişatını değiştirecek olması!"

languages.text: {n}Al fijarse en Ulfar, el rostro de Seberian se ilumina.{/n} «¡Por la sangre del Dios Emperador y todos los santos! ¿Qué trae aquí a uno de sus ángeles? Bueno, no importa, lo que importa es que con usted aquí, el curso de la batalla cambiará, ¡no cabe duda!».
languages.original_text: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Al fijarse en Ulfar, el rostro de Seberian se ilumina.{/n} «¡Por la sangre del Dios Emperador y todos los santos! ¿Qué trae aquí a uno de sus ángeles? Bueno, no importa, lo que importa es que con usted aquí, el curso de la batalla cambiará, ¡no cabe duda!».

languages.text: {n}Als er Ulfar bemerkt, hellt sich Seberians Miene auf.{/n} "Beim Blut des Gottimperators und aller seiner Heiligen! Was führt einen Seiner Engel hierher? Aber das spielt wohl keine Rolle. Entscheidend ist, dass Eure Gegenwart, das Blatt gewiss zu unseren Gunsten wenden wird."
languages.original_text: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Als er Ulfar bemerkt, hellt sich Seberians Miene auf.{/n} "Beim Blut des Gottimperators und aller seiner Heiligen! Was führt einen Seiner Engel hierher? Aber das spielt wohl keine Rolle. Entscheidend ist, dass Eure Gegenwart, das Blatt gewiss zu unseren Gunsten wenden wird."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの顔はウルファルに気づくと明るくなった。{/n}「神帝の血と聖人の血によって！彼の天使の一人がここに来たのは何のためか？それはあまり重要ではない。重要なのは、あなたの存在が確実に戦況を転じることだ！」
languages.original_text: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの顔はウルファルに気づくと明るくなった。{/n}「神帝の血と聖人の血によって！彼の天使の一人がここに来たのは何のためか？それはあまり重要ではない。重要なのは、あなたの存在が確実に戦況を転じることだ！」
